payload.answer: Reject the proposed durable memory update. 'Sara is Daniele's niece' conflicts with the existing stored fact 'Sara is Daniele's daughter.' Do not overwrite the existing relation without strong evidence or disambiguation.

entity_resolution.reason: The proposed claim uses the same named entities but directly contradicts an existing family relationship; there is no basis to resolve this as a new entity or overwrite current memory.

details: Blocked a high-confidence overwrite of an existing family relationship.
Preserved the current stored fact and did not commit the contradictory proposal.
No new durable memory card was created.

repair_options: Require supporting evidence or provenance for the new claim before any update.
If both claims may refer to different people with the same name, disambiguate the entities and create separate records.
If uncertainty should be preserved, store the new statement only as an uncommitted disputed claim with source metadata, not as current durable memory.
